cp10Note: AAI-CP10 refreshed currentness metadata for final package identity and readiness handover. CP10 promoted no new machine-contract families.
activeNonDefaultStatusRule: A schema marked active_non_default_superseded_by_current_default remains a retained active machine contract for legacy/example validation, but it is not the current default for new implementation selection.
nonClaimsLegacy: currentness metadata does not promote drafts

draftNonDefaultAddenda.note: Explainable Current-State Evidence draft contracts only; no current/default promotion.
QueryPlanIR and Capability Manifest performance-envelope extension drafts only; no current/default promotion.
